phases.summary: AI dashboard, technical analysis, watchlist, alerts, source metadata, security baseline.
Financial data and EPS model with actual/model separation.
Master Data + Global Search platform foundation. Preview validation pending.
Supply Chain Intelligence. Blocked until Master Data Preview is accepted.

technicalDebt: Split server.mjs and public/app.js before large Phase 3 expansion.
Move generated artifacts to a durable artifact strategy.
Add live API schema validation and Preview performance baselines.
knownLimits: No AI natural-language answer layer yet.
No supply-chain events in Search Index yet.
